name: Skarhead
description: '''Skarhead''' is an American [[hardcore punk]] band from New York City, founded and fronted by [[Danny Diablo|Lord Ezec a.k.a. Danny Diablo]] (of [[Crown of Thornz]]). The group is considered the originators of thugcore music, a subgenre of hardcore punk "full of relentless [[Breakdown (music)|breakdowns]] and throwdown-ready posturing". They have toured with [[Gwar]], [[Hatebreed]], and [[Earth Crisis]]. They have been cited as an influence by [[Deez Nuts (band)|Deez Nuts]] and [[Fucked Up]].
